instruction: Open System Settings, go to Bluetooth, and turn the Bluetooth switch {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 AX-tree, §7); System Settings toggle verified via the live AX switch value rather than the async-flushed plist, the macOS analogue of OSWorld check_accessibility_tree

args: defaults write com.apple.Bluetooth ControllerPowerState -int {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.Bluetooth ControllerPowerState -int {WANT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
